title: Additional Data
description: Enter your external activities to enrich your compliance score and prepare your ESG reports.

governance.label: Governance
governance.description: Board composition, anti-corruption policies, code of conduct, CSR committee.

social.label: Social & HR
social.description: Headcount, training, diversity, working conditions, social dialogue.

environment.label: Environment
environment.description: Water consumption, renewable energy, biodiversity, mobility.

procurement.label: Procurement
procurement.description: Local sourcing, supplier audits, responsible procurement policies.

community.label: Community
community.description: Patronage, volunteering, NGO partnerships, local actions.
